User Story: As a student, I want to login using my university ID so that I can access my attendance profile.
As a teacher, I want to view a real-time list of present students so that I can monitor attendance instantly.
As a system, I want to detect if a student is within 10 meters of the classroom so that attendance can be marked automatically.
As a student, I want to receive a notification when my attendance is marked so that I know the system recorded my presence.
As an admin, I want the ability to manually override attendance so that technical errors can be corrected.
